text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After many busy days of attending<n>workshops
and meetings, I finally<n>have a moment to rest,
when...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
What is the meaning of this? Your<n>workspace is
covered in dust, trash,<n>and loose documents—it's
filthy!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I meant to return to work afterdelivering these handouts to you, but Ican't leave this office like... this.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
A cluttered room is a reflection of a<n>cluttered
mind. Now, up on your feet.<n>I'll help, but we're
taking care of this<n>immediately.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm suddenly subjected to a<n>one-on-one crash
course on cleaning.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Open the windows and go get a trash<n>bag ready!
We'll start by clearing your<n>desk!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Throw away everything you don't<n>need! Gather
up all the trinkets you<n>have lying about... Hey,
don't just<n>throw those loose paperclips in the<n>
drawer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The cleaning session proceeds<n>quickly, thanks to
her strict, yet<n>precise instructions.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I think we've finished forthe most part. All that's left is todispose of the trash and sort thesedocuments.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've come this far, I might<n>as well
see this through to the end.<n>We'll split the final
two tasks. Which<n>do you prefer I handle?
choice_data_list: Could you take care of the trash?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Perhaps I should warm up<n>before
tackling this mountain of<n>rubbish...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Urk! This is... nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And with that, my office is<n>spick-and-span.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. It's only natural for fellow<n>employees
to assist each other. Now,<n>if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I foresee a great deal of muscle pain<n>for me
tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
While file organization is my forte, this<n>huge pile
is rather daunting. But very<n>well.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Save, toss, unclear, toss, save,<n>unclear... I knew
what to expect going<n>into this, but the sheer
volume<n>complicates things.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize this task would take<n>so long.
Perhaps it's time we consider<n>moving away
from using printouts to<n>share information.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I should report my findings to URA's<n>upper
management.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I receive a survey<n>about
whether the academy should<n>begin using
paperless methods to<n>distribute information.
